task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Wholesale Buyers' customer group with the correct tax class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin 'Customer Groups' page, look for a row with the Group Name 'Wholesale Buyers' and Tax Class 'Retail Customer'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the customer 'john.smith@example.com' is assigned to the 'Wholesale Buyers' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin 'All Customers' page or the customer edit page, look for the customer 'john.smith@example.com' and check that their assigned 'Group' is 'Wholesale Buyers'.

task_completion.description: Verify tier pricing configuration for Business Laptop Pro (LAPTOP-001).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Advanced Pricing settings for LAPTOP-001, look for tier price entries assigned to the 'Wholesale Buyers' group with Quantity 5 for $849.99 and Quantity 10 for $749.99.

task_completion.description: Verify tier pricing configuration for Wireless Headphones (HEADPHONES-001).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Advanced Pricing settings for HEADPHONES-001, look for tier price entries assigned to the 'Wholesale Buyers' group with Quantity 10 for $119.99 and Quantity 25 for $99.99.

task_completion.description: Verify tier pricing configuration for Insulated Water Bottle (BOTTLE-001).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Advanced Pricing settings for BOTTLE-001, look for tier price entries assigned to the 'Wholesale Buyers' group with Quantity 50 for $14.99 and Quantity 100 for $11.99.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Magento Admin GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento Admin interface being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a text editor to fake the completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be typing the expected outcomes into a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually saved the changes in the Magento Admin.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages like 'You saved the customer group.', 'You saved the customer.', or 'You saved the product.' after making changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Customer Group named 'Wholesale Buyers' with 'Retail Customer' Tax Class. The customer 'john.smith@example.com' must be assigned to this group. Tier pricing must be configured for this specific group on three products: LAPTOP-001 (Qty 5: $849.99, Qty 10: $749.99), HEADPHONES-001 (Qty 10: $119.99, Qty 25: $99.99), and BOTTLE-001 (Qty 50: $14.99, Qty 100: $11.99).
